message:
Add Max/Min VJP tie-breaking tests and higher-order gradient tests

Tests Max/Min VJP behavior when inputs are equal (first arg wins per
Ge/Le semantics) and when distinct (gradient flows only to the
maximal/minimal input). Also adds second-derivative tests for x² and
exp(x). 66 fj-ad tests (was 60), 894 workspace total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
